name: Fruit Tortilla Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Line a baking sheet with foil and lightly spray with nonfat cooking spray.
3. Place tortillas on the baking sheet and bake for 3 to 5 minutes, just until crisp.
4. In a food processor or blender, combine ricotta cheese, cottage cheese, 2 1/2 tablespoons brown sugar, and cinnamon. Blend until smooth and creamy.
5. Divide the cheese mixture evenly among the tortillas.
6. Top each tortilla with 1/4 cup mixed berries.
7. Sprinkle remaining brown sugar on top of the berries.
8. Bake for 5 minutes, or until heated through. Serve immediately.
Per serving = 209 calories, 0.4 gm fat, 11.2 mg cholesterol, 418.9 mg sodium, 37.7 gm carbohydrate, 7.3 gm fiber, 15.4 gm protein.
